result:
All 11 tests pass.

**Summary of changes:**

- `src/main/scala/minigit/Main.scala` — Full MiniGit implementation:
  - `init`: creates `.minigit/{objects,commits,index,HEAD}`
  - `add`: MiniHash file, store blob in `objects/`, append filename to `index`
  - `commit -m`: build commit file (parent/timestamp/message/files sorted lexicographically), MiniHash it, write to `commits/`, update `HEAD`, clear `index`
  - `log`: traverse parent chain from HEAD, print `commit/Date/Message` blocks most-recent-first
  - `miniHash`: FNV-1a variant using natural Long overflow for mod 2^64, formatted as 16-char zero-padded unsigned hex

- `build.sh` — Fixed the generated `minigit` launcher to embed an absolute classpath at build time, so it works when invoked from subdirectories (e.g., `../minigit`).
